title: Notification No.9/2004-Cus(NT), dated 23.01.2004
text: 23rd January, 2004 Notification N0. 9/2004 - Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Bangalore, to act as Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo (Import and General), New Custom House, Indira Gandhi International Airport, New Delhi for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s. Micro Village Communication Private Limited, 730, C.M.H. Road, Indiranagar, Ist Stage, Bangalore, issued vide DRI F.No. 50D/91/2000-C.I., dated the 16th July, 2003, by the Assistant Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, 7th Floor, I.P.Bhavan, I.P. Estate, New Delhi- 110 002. V. Kezo Under Secretary to the Government of India F.NO.437/30/2003-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
